table.name: tb_sign
table.Comment: 用户签到月度汇总表(位图存储)

table.name: tb_sign_reward_rule
table.Comment: 签到里程碑奖励规则表

column.name: shop_ids
column.Comment: 本条消息关联的商户ID(JSON数组)

column.name: link_type
column.Comment: 跳转类型(0无跳转,1商户,2笔记,3优惠券,4外链)

column.name: position
column.Comment: 投放位置(home首页,shop商户页,type分类页)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态(0待审核,1已发布,2已屏蔽,3草稿)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态(0待处理,1处理中,2已回复,3已关闭)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态(0待处理,1已处理,2已忽略)

column.name: name
column.Comment: 等级名称(青铜,白银,黄金...)

column.name: type
column.Comment: 类型(1系统通知,2点赞,3评论,4关注,5优惠券到账,6订单状态)

column.name: user_type
column.Comment: 操作人类型(0系统,1用户,2运营,3管理员)

column.name: third_payment_no
column.Comment: 第三方流水号(微信,支付宝)

column.name: pay_type
column.Comment: 支付方式(1余额,2微信,3支付宝)

column.name: direction
column.Comment: 方向(1收入/退款到账,2支出/支付)

column.name: type
column.Comment: 类型(1签到,2评价,3消费,4活动奖励,5兑换扣减,6过期扣减)

column.name: points
column.Comment: 积分变动值(正=获得,负=扣减)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态(0申请中,1审核通过,2退款成功,3已拒绝)

column.name: target_type
column.Comment: 目标类型(1商户,2笔记,3评论,4用户)

column.name: reason_type
column.Comment: 原因类型(1虚假信息,2色情低俗,3广告骚扰,4侵权,5其他)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态(0待审核,1已处理,2已驳回)

column.name: order_id
column.Comment: 关联订单ID(核销后才能评价)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态(0待审核,1已发布,2已屏蔽)

column.name: category
column.Comment: 分类(0通用,1政治,2色情,3广告,4辱骂)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态(0待审核,1已通过,2已拒绝)

column.name: result_shop_id
column.Comment: 审核通过后创建的商户ID

column.name: biz_id
column.Comment: 关联业务ID(券订单ID/抽奖记录ID)

column.name: reward_type
column.Comment: 奖励类型(1抽奖机会,2优惠券,3积分,4实物)

column.name: reward_value
column.Comment: 奖励值(券=面值分,抽奖=次数,积分=分值)

column.name: type
column.Comment: 类型(0登录,1注册,2找回密码,3绑定手机)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态(0未使用,1已使用,2已过期)

column.name: name
column.Comment: 标签名称(如网红打卡,人均50以下)

column.name: type
column.Comment: 类型(0商户标签,1笔记话题)

column.name: front_image
column.Comment: 身份证正面照(相对路径)

column.name: back_image
column.Comment: 身份证反面照(相对路径)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态(0待审核,1已通过,2已拒绝)

column.name: max_continuous_sign_days
column.Comment: 历史最长连续签到天数

column.name: type
column.Comment: 消息类型：1系统通知 2点赞收藏 3新增关注 4评论和@

column.name: frozen_balance
column.Comment: 冻结余额(分,退款审核中等)

column.name: id
column.Comment: 订单ID(全局唯一,雪花算法)

column.name: pay_type
column.Comment: 支付方式(0未支付,1余额,2微信,3支付宝)

column.name: status
column.Comment: 订单状态(0未支付,1已支付,2已使用,3已退款,4已取消)
